title: Tridents 'n' Stuff
description: Adds a variety of craftable and unique new tridents, as well as other pokey weapons including spears and harpoons!
body: ![Main Tridents and Stuff banner](https://i.imgur.com/Ljak1dP.png) [![Bisect Hosting Link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/85a7141b-76c9-4f0c-bd04-21f4b0d56c4a.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/fzzyhmstrs) ## Tridents 'n' Stuff A simple equipment mod that builds off of the vanilla Trident concept, adding a bunch of themed and unique tridents, as well as other throwing weapons like spears and harpoons. ![Craftable Tridents Banner](https://i.imgur.com/Z3C7Brg.png) Craft a variety of themed tridents from a basic Minecraft trident. Each one has particular strengths, such as: * Increased damage against certain mob types * Increased stats * etc. ![Unique Tridents Banner](https://i.imgur.com/PuR1wLS.png) Find a slumbering trident, and one of the unique Icons, to unlock power from within the empty vessel. * Rare loot drops in ocean-themed chests as well as from oceanix mobs and the wither. * Smith a Slumbering trident, one of the 5 Icons, and a netherite ingot together to awaken one of the Unique Tridents. * Each unique comes with powerful themed abilities. Control gravity, lightning, the raw magic of evil, and more! ![Spears and Harpoons Banner](https://i.imgur.com/ZcskRfh.png) Besides tridents, T.N.S. adds spears and harpoons! * Spears are simple sword-like weapons that you can throw like a trident. They don't fly through water, but do take normal sword enchants like Sharpness * Harpoons are an aquatic bow-and-arrow. Craft a Harpoon Launcher and find or craft harpoons. They launch like expendable tridents, and fly underwater!
